Meaning: Blocked: at least one required dependency, object, proof bridge, source extraction, module seam, or consumer contract is missing or not naturally generated at the required layer.
Required action: Do not start the blocked phase. Add the finding to Static code findings and generate one or more upstream addressing phases at the natural emergence layer of the missing structure before the blocked phase.
Ledger effect: Record the R result, missing dependency, natural addressing layer, generated addressing phase(s), and tool version/timestamp in the pre-implementation check output.
